data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,900 USDT with a Narrowed 0.69% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 02, 2025, 15:32 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,900 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,900.140015 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.69% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: FDUSD Experiences Depegging Following Justin Sun's Statement on Bankruptcy
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market data indicates that FDUSD has experienced a depegging event. This occurred after Justin Sun announced that the entity behind FDUSD has declared bankruptcy and is unable to fulfill customer fund redemption obligations. At the time of reporting, FDUSD was priced at 0.9949 USDT.

data.description:
Domino's Pizza is partnering with DoorDash to expand its delivery network across the U. S.
source: https://tokenist.com/dominos-aims-for-1b-sales-boost-with-doordash-partnership/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=dominos-aims-for-1b-sales-boost-with-doordash-partnership

data.title: Market News: Trump says Musk may leave in the next few weeks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: Trump has informed his inner circle that Musk may leave in the next few weeks and is expected to resign from his current position in the Government Efficiency Department. According to three Trump insiders who wish to remain anonymous, Trump is still satisfied with Musk and his Government Efficiency Department, but both have decided in recent days that Musk will soon go back to manage his own company. Musk's impending exit comes as some insiders in the Trump administration and many external allies are frustrated by his unpredictability, increasingly viewing the billionaire as a political burden. A senior administration official said Musk may retain an informal role as an adviser and continue to appear occasionally in the White House. People familiar with the matter said the transition is likely to mark the end of Musk's era as a "special government employee."

data.title: Justin Sun: FDT is actually insolvent and unable to fulfill its obligation to redeem customer funds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sun Yuchen posted on the X platform that First Digital Trust (FDT) is actually insolvent and unable to fulfill its obligations to redeem customer funds. It strongly recommends that users take immediate action to protect their assets, and urges regulators and law enforcement agencies to take prompt action to resolve these issues and prevent further significant losses.

data.title: Ripple: USD Stablecoin RLUSD Has Been Integrated into Ripple Payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Ripple announced that Ripple USD (RLUSD) has been integrated into Ripple's flagship payment solution Ripple Payments to further promote corporate utility and demand for this asset. RLUSD is a US dollar-denominated enterprise-level stablecoin with a current market value of nearly US$250 million. The stablecoin has been launched on Kraken today.

data.title: UK approves BlackRock to operate as a crypto asset firm in the country, Galaxy Digital gets derivatives trading license
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BlackRock has been approved by the UK Financial Conduct Authority to operate as a crypto asset company in the country, and Galaxy Digital's London office has been licensed to conduct derivatives trading. Since 2020, companies conducting certain crypto asset activities in the UK must comply with revised money laundering, terrorist financing and funds transfer regulations and register with the FCA. There are currently 51 companies on the crypto asset register, including Coinbase, Fidelity, Gemini and Kraken. Due to the FCA's strict approval process, only about 14% of applications are approved. (The Block)

data.title: Source: General Counsel Kalshi to join US government efficiency department DOGE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett wrote on the X platform that sources revealed that Eliezer Mishory, chief regulatory officer and general counsel of the prediction market Kalshi, will leave and join the DOGE team of the U.S. government's Department of Efficiency.

data.title: PayPal Expands Cryptocurrency Support in the U.S.
data.description: According to Odaily, PayPal has expanded its cryptocurrency offerings for U.S. users by adding support for SOL and LINK. This move allows American customers to buy, sell, and hold these digital currencies on the platform, further integrating cryptocurrencies into mainstream financial services.

data.title: Mexican President Rules Out Retaliatory Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum announced that the country will not implement retaliatory tariff measures. This statement comes amid ongoing discussions about trade policies and economic strategies. The decision reflects Mexico's approach to maintaining stable international trade relations.
